events.title: Pump prices rise sharply
events.body: A new round of price increases at filling stations triggers public frustration in major cities.

events.title: First street demonstrations
events.body: Small groups begin protesting in Lagos over the cost of transport and basic goods.

events.title: Civil society calls for talks
events.body: Advocacy organisations urge the government and unions to open dialogue.

events.title: Government defends policy
events.body: Officials reiterate that subsidy removal is necessary and promise targeted support.

events.title: Unions join protests
events.body: Labour unions announce participation, expanding demonstrations to Abuja.
